jsonLd.title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at Melorra
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Melorra in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Melorra:
Melorra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra!
